concerns.text: Task T028a is marked incomplete (unchecked) and describes the core simulation loop required by FR-004 (10,000 iterations). The task description states 'The loop must run at least 10,000 iterations' but the task itself is not completed, meaning the primary deliverable (results/simulation_results.csv) is missing. This is a direct failure to satisfy FR-004 and SC-003 in the task list, as the implementation of the loop is the only way to meet the iteration count.

Task T029 (calculate_aggregate_metrics) is marked incomplete. It is the sole mechanism to satisfy FR-005 (calculate empirical Type I error rates and Power) and SC-001/SC-002. Without this task being completed, the spec's requirement to measure error rates against nominal alpha is unfulfilled in the implementation plan.

Task T039 (Comparison Report Generation) is marked incomplete. FR-009 requires the system to 'report deviations in p-values and effect sizes' for real-world datasets. T039 is the only task explicitly generating this report. Its incompleteness means the spec requirement for real-world validation reporting is not preserved in the task list.

Task T053 (Mixed-Effects Model Analysis) is marked incomplete. FR-010 explicitly mandates fitting mixed-effects models to test scaling impact. T053 is the only task addressing this. Its absence from the completed list violates the requirement to statistically validate the scaling method's significance as per FR-010 and SC-007.

Task T057 (Sensitivity Analysis) is marked incomplete. The spec's 'Assumption about threshold justification' explicitly states a sensitivity analysis will be conducted. T057 is the only task implementing this. Leaving it incomplete weakens the validation of the research design against the stated assumption, violating the requirement to verify the threshold choice.

Task T058 (Numerical Precision Stability Check) is marked incomplete. The spec's 'Assumption about statistical tests' and 'Edge Cases' require verifying that scaling does not introduce numerical instability. T058 is the only task addressing this. Its incompleteness leaves a critical validation step for the core hypothesis (numerical invariance) unimplemented.

Task T059 (Real-World Dataset Metadata Enrichment) is marked incomplete. FR-008 and FR-009 require ingesting and processing real-world datasets with traceability. T059 adds the 'source_verified' flag to ensure data integrity and traceability (Constitution Principle III). Its incompleteness risks violating the data hygiene and traceability requirements for real-world data.
